data.title: Xplora Technologies Sees Substantial Subscription Growth in 2025
data.description:
An announcement from Xplora Technologies AS ( (DE:86P) ) is now available.

Xplora Technologies has reported a significant increase in its subscription base, reaching 358,000 as of March 31, 2025, marking an increase of 103,000 from the previous year. This growth highlights the company’s robust business operations and its strategic focus on expanding its connectivity plans and premium services, particularly in the Nordic region. The company anticipates seasonal fluctuations in its subscription growth, influenced by periods like Back-to-school and the Festive Season.

More about Xplora Technologies AS

Xplora Technologies AS is a platform and services company specializing in children’s smartwatches. The company aims to provide a safe digital onboarding for children, balancing screen time with physical activity. Headquartered in Norway, Xplora operates in leading European markets and is listed on Euronext Growth under the ticker symbol XPLRA.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €88.01M

data.title: Westgold Resources Announces Change in Substantial Holding
data.description:
Westgold Resources ( (AU:WGX) ) has provided an announcement.

Westgold Resources Limited has reported a change in the substantial holding of its voting securities. State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries, including State Street Bank and Trust Company, have adjusted their relevant interests in the company’s shares. This change in voting power reflects the dynamic nature of investment management and securities lending activities, which can impact the control and influence over company decisions. The announcement highlights the ongoing shifts in shareholder composition, which may affect Westgold Resources’ strategic direction and stakeholder interests.

data.description:

data.description:
Johns Lyng Group Ltd ( (AU:JLG) ) has issued an update.

The announcement may impact the company’s shareholder composition and could influence its market dynamics and stakeholder relations.

data.title: Cox ABG Group S.A. Considers Share Exchange with Cox Energy
data.description:
COX ABG Group SA ( (ES:COXG) ) has issued an update.

Cox ABG Group S.A. has announced a potential share exchange operation involving specific shareholders of Cox Energy, S.A.B. de C.V. The proposed operation, currently in its study phase, involves a capital increase through a non-cash contribution, with an exchange ratio of one Cox ABG share for every five Cox Energy shares. The company has not confirmed the execution of this operation and does not plan to extend it to all Cox Energy shareholders or make a public purchase offer at this time.

More about COX ABG Group SA

data.title: Wacoal Holdings Completes Treasury Stock Purchase
data.description:
WACOAL HOLDINGS ( (JP:3591) ) has issued an announcement.

Wacoal Holdings Corp. has completed the purchase of 384,900 shares of its treasury stock for approximately 1.99 billion yen, as part of a resolution made in May 2024. This stock buyback, conducted through the Tokyo Stock Exchange, is part of a larger plan to purchase up to 7.3 million shares, aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

More about WACOAL HOLDINGS

Wacoal Holdings Corp. operates in the apparel industry, primarily focusing on the design, manufacturing, and marketing of intimate apparel. The company is recognized for its high-quality lingerie and undergarments, catering to a global market with a strong presence in Asia, North America, and Europe.

data.title: Telstra Updates on Share Buy-Back Progress
data.description:
Telstra Corporation Limited ( (AU:TLS) ) has issued an announcement.

Telstra Group Limited has announced an update on its ongoing share buy-back program, with a total of 6,123,371 ordinary fully paid securities bought back on the previous day, adding to the 67,800,056 securities already bought back. This buy-back initiative is part of Telstra’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, reflecting its commitment to returning capital to shareholders.

More about Telstra Corporation Limited

Telstra Group Limited is a leading telecommunications and technology company in Australia, providing a wide range of services including mobile, broadband, and fixed-line services. It focuses on delivering innovative communication solutions to both individual consumers and businesses, maintaining a strong presence in the Australian market.

data.title: Prudential plc Executes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Prudential ( (GB:PRU) ) has shared an update.

Prudential plc has announced the purchase of 260,000 of its own ordinary shares through Barclays Capital Securities Limited on the London Stock Exchange. This transaction is part of a share buyback program authorized by shareholders at the 2024 Annual General Meeting. The shares were purchased at an average price of GBP 7.2129 and will be canceled, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,612,797,013. This move is expected to impact the company’s voting rights and may influence shareholder interests under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

More about Prudential

Prudential plc is a company incorporated and registered in England and Wales, operating primarily in the financial services industry. It is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including the London Stock Exchange, and focuses on providing insurance and financial services across various markets.
